title: Lizard Tail
description: When your HP would be reduced to [blue]0[/blue], heal to [green]50%[/green] of your Max HP instead (works once).
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: One-time use relic that prevents death by healing the player to 50% of max HP. After use, the relic becomes disabled.
